texto: Resistances do not derive from a few heterogeneous principles
autor: but neither are they a lure or a promise that is of necessity betrayed. They are the odd term in relations of power
explicacao: Citação de but neither are they a lure or a promise that is of necessity betrayed. They are the odd term in relations of power sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Resistances do not derive from a few heterogeneous principles” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
